title: euphorbia pilosa
intro: Euphorbia pilosa, also known as the hairy spurge, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Euphorbia pilosa is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and may also be applied topically as a poultice or cream to alleviate various health issues.
